ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the post was made */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the post was made */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the post was made */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic associated with the post */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post */,
  "post_url" TEXT /* URL of the original post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the post (a value between -1 and 1) */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment of the post (positive, negative, or neutral) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis performed */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brand_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post containing the brand mention */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of brand mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brand_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usermentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post containing the user mention */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of user mention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usermentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usermentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post containing the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_caption" TEXT /* Caption of the image */,
  "image_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post containing the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_caption" TEXT /* Caption of the video */,
  "video_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "platform_api_key" TEXT /* API key for the platform */,
  "platform_api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being tracked */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the post */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the post */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_topics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)
